title: Helm: why does dapr_scheduler.securityContext.fsGroup have a value by default?
body:
This change was introduced in [#7891]() but I think it should be opt in. It it only useful when you mount custom volumes, but it breaks default installations on OpenShift. I got around it by doing: ``` dapr_scheduler: securityContext: fsGroup: ~ ``` Helpful hint for people trying to search for dapr openshift:
This was also needed to run versions < 1.16 on OpenShift (already solved in master branch): ``` dapr_placement: cluster: forceInMemoryLog: true ```
